Name: ItemLotParam
Description: Determines the contents of treasures and other item rewards.

Fields.Name: Rarity
Fields.Description: Determines the SFX used to display the rarity of the treasure lot.

Fields.Name: 1: Item Category
Fields.Description: The item category the awarded item belongs to.

Fields.Name: 1: Item ID
Fields.Description: The ID of the item awarded by this slot.

Fields.Name: 1: Item Amount
Fields.Description: The amount of the specified item given if the item in this slot is rolled.

Fields.Name: 1: Weight
Fields.Description: The weighting for the awarded item in this slot.

Fields.Name: 1: World Tendency Weight
Fields.Description: The weight applied to the item roll based on World Tendency.

Fields.Name: 1: World Tendency Apply Value
Fields.Description: The value of World Tendency required for the item roll calculationss to include the QWCBasePoint weight.

Fields.Name: 1: Apply Luck Modifier
Fields.Description: Apply the luck modifier for this slot. Linked to the Item Discovery stat.
